rationale: Backend cloud engineer with two TCS IT-services stints; only AI exposure is self-learner courses and a small RAG side project with no production ML or IR deployment.

Has an advanced BM25 skill (56 months) and lightweight XGBoost/ML work at Flipkart, but career is primarily data engineering (ETL, Airflow, Spark) with no evidence of owning a production retrieval or ranking system.
Marketing/operations professional with multiple fictional company entries (Initech, Wayne Enterprises, Dunder Mifflin) and zero engineering or ML background.
Entire career consists of enterprise sales and accounting at fictional companies (Hooli, Pied Piper) with no engineering or ML work whatsoever.
Full-stack web/QA engineer at Zomato with self-learner AI exposure but no production ML or IR systems; Capgemini IT-services stint is an additional negative signal.

Both employers are fictional companies (Stark Industries, Pied Piper); 3.2 years of frontend/DevOps work with no production ML or IR experience, and the Pinecone intermediate skill is unsupported by any legitimate work history.

Current and most recent role is at fictional company Initech; career descriptions show only frontend and full-stack web development with no production ML or IR work despite listing Data Science as an advanced skill.
HR Manager at TCS with a brand design/marketing background across their entire 3-year career and zero ML or engineering work.

Senior NLP engineer with 8 years at AI/product companies (Sarvam AI, Mad Street Den, Paytm) who built a 35M-item hybrid BM25+dense retrieval system, shipped LoRA/QLoRA fine-tuning pipelines, ran live A/B tests, and holds an IIT Madras M.S. degree — directly matching all core JD requirements.
Marketing/sales career spanning enterprise sales, SEO content writing, and business analysis including a stint at fictional Wayne Enterprises, with no technical or ML engineering work.
